prompt: I need architecture documentation for our SaveSystem. It uses SaveManager.cs as the entry point, SaveData.cs as the serializable data model, JsonPersistence.cs for file I/O, and SaveMigrator.cs for version upgrades. The system serializes game state to JSON with versioned migration support.
assertions: Output is saved to a Documents/Systems/ path with .md extension
Document contains all 8 required sections in order
Architecture section includes a Mermaid diagram showing SaveManager, SaveData, JsonPersistence, and SaveMigrator relationships
Data Flow section includes a Mermaid sequence diagram showing the save/load pipeline
Public API section has a table with method signatures and (file:line) citations
Extension Guide explains how to add new save data types
